verdict: High AI displacement risk: Most tasks are already automated by current frontier models.

reasoning_steps.title: Routine cognition is high
reasoning_steps.body: Task 1: Analyze, manipulate, or process large sets of data using statistical software. This task is already largely automated by current frontier models.

reasoning_steps.title: AI capability gap is wide
reasoning_steps.body: Task 8: Identify relationships and trends or any factors that could affect the results of research. Current frontier models can already extract insights from large datasets, reducing the need for human intervention in this task.

adjacent_careers.name: Data Scientist
adjacent_careers.reasoning: Both roles involve working with data, but Data Scientists focus more on the analysis and interpretation of results.

adjacent_careers.name: Software Engineer
adjacent_careers.reasoning: While some software engineering tasks may overlap with ML Engineering, the latter requires specialized knowledge in machine learning algorithms and techniques.

recent_developments.headline: Google's BERT Neural Network Beats Human Experts at Multiple Tasks
recent_developments.impact: Current frontier models like BERT have already surpassed human performance in many NLP tasks, indicating a high risk of AI displacement for ML Engineers.

recent_developments.headline: AI coding assistants see broad enterprise adoption
recent_developments.impact: Major firms report 25–30% of new code is now AI-generated and reviewed by engineers.

quotes.quote: Software engineering will be very different by the end of 2025. Most code will be written by AI, with human engineers reviewing and directing.
quotes.speaker: Dario Amodei
quotes.title: CEO, Anthropic

quotes.quote: AI is going to be the biggest technological shift of our lifetimes. Bigger than mobile, bigger than the web. Inside Microsoft, more than 30 percent of the code in some projects is now written by AI.
quotes.speaker: Satya Nadella
quotes.title: CEO, Microsoft

quotes.quote: More than a quarter of new code at Google is generated by AI, then reviewed and accepted by engineers.
quotes.speaker: Sundar Pichai
quotes.title: CEO, Google / Alphabet
